title: Working Intricately with Moh Daha.
abstract: Moh Daha has been instrumental for initiating and coordinating many European consortia in the area of immunopathogenesis of glomerulonephritis including a number with the author. This review provides a personal history of these developments, ending with INTRICATE, an FP7 medium scale project investigating ANCA-associated vasculitis (AAV). The current status of this research and recent insight in the autoimmune reactions and autoantigens in AAV are briefly summarized.
